translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi có vài cuộc hẹn.
translations.nb: Jeg har flere avtaler i dag.
translations.id: Saya punya beberapa janji hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag har flera möten i dag.
translations.da: Jeg har flere aftaler i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は予定がいくつかあります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present), expressing possession; not used as auxiliary here.
Indefinite quantifier functioning as a determiner; modifies the noun 'Termine' to indicate plural quantity.
Common noun in plural accusative; direct object of 'habe'.
Temporal adverb specifying when the appointments are; modifies the clause.

sentences.target: Er hat mehrere Fragen zur Anmeldung.

translations.de: Er hat mehrere Fragen zur Anmeldung.
translations.en: He has several questions about the registration.
translations.es: Tiene varias preguntas sobre la inscripción.
translations.fr: Il a plusieurs questions concernant l'inscription.
translations.ko: 그는 등록에 관해 몇 가지 질문이 있어요.
translations.ru: У него есть несколько вопросов по регистрации.
translations.pt: Ele tem várias dúvidas sobre a inscrição.
translations.he: יש לו כמה שאלות לגבי ההרשמה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có vài câu hỏi về việc đăng ký.
translations.nl: Hij heeft meerdere vragen over de inschrijving.
translations.uk: У нього є кілька запитань щодо реєстрації.
translations.hu: Néhány kérdése van a regisztrációval kapcsolatban.
translations.hi: पंजीकरण के बारे में उसके पास कुछ सवाल हैं.
translations.el: Έχει μερικές ερωτήσεις σχετικά με την εγγραφή.
translations.nb: Han har flere spørsmål om registreringen.
translations.id: Dia punya beberapa pertanyaan tentang pendaftaran.
translations.sv: Han har flera frågor om registreringen.
translations.da: Han har flere spørgsmål om registreringen.
translations.ja: 登録についていくつか質問があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present), expressing possession of 'Fragen'.
Indefinite quantifier determiner; modifies 'Fragen' to indicate plural quantity.
Common noun in plural accusative; direct object of 'hat'.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu der') governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase specifying the topic ('regarding').
Common noun in singular dative as object of the preposition 'zur'; specifies the topic of the questions.

sentences.target: Wir suchen mehrere Freiwillige für morgen.

translations.de: Wir suchen mehrere Freiwillige für morgen.
translations.en: We are looking for several volunteers for tomorrow.
translations.fr: Nous cherchons plusieurs bénévoles pour demain.
translations.ko: 내일 자원봉사자를 몇 명 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为明天寻找几位志愿者。
translations.yue: 我哋為聽日搵緊幾位義工。
translations.ru: Мы ищем нескольких волонтёров на завтра.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando vários voluntários para amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm vài tình nguyện viên cho ngày mai.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن عدة متطوعين ليوم غد.
translations.nl: We zoeken meerdere vrijwilligers voor morgen.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо кількох волонтерів на завтра.
translations.hi: हम कल के लिए कई स्वयंसेवकों की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi søker flere frivillige til i morgen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari beberapa relawan untuk besok.
translations.sv: Vi söker flera volontärer till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi søger flere frivillige til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日のために数名のボランティアを募集しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; grammatical subject.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present); transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite quantifier determiner; modifies 'Freiwillige' to indicate plural quantity.
Common noun in plural accusative; direct object of 'suchen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a temporal/prepositional phrase indicating intended time.
Temporal adverb; complements 'für' in the PP 'für morgen' to specify time.

sentences.target: Im Regal stehen mehrere leere Flaschen.

translations.de: Im Regal stehen mehrere leere Flaschen.
translations.en: Several empty bottles are on the shelf.
translations.es: Hay varias botellas vacías en el estante.
translations.fr: Il y a plusieurs bouteilles vides sur l'étagère.
translations.it: Ci sono diverse bottiglie vuote sullo scaffale.
translations.ko: 선반에 빈 병이 몇 개 있어요.
translations.ru: На полке стоят несколько пустых бутылок.
translations.pt: Há várias garrafas vazias na prateleira.
translations.he: יש כמה בקבוקים ריקים על המדף.
translations.vi: Có vài chai rỗng trên kệ.
translations.ar: هناك عدة زجاجات فارغة על الرف.
translations.nl: Er staan meerdere lege flessen op de plank.
translations.uk: На полиці стоять кілька порожніх пляшок.
translations.hu: A polcon néhány üres üveg van.
translations.hi: शेल्फ पर कुछ खाली बोतलें रखी हैं.
translations.pl: Na półce stoi kilka pustych butelek.
translations.el: Στο ράφι υπάρχουν μερικά άδεια μπουκάλια.
translations.nb: Det står flere tomme flasker på hyllen.
translations.id: Ada beberapa botol kosong di rak.
translations.sv: Det står flera tomma flaskor på hyllan.
translations.ro: Pe raft sunt câteva sticle goale.
translations.cs: Na polici stojí několik prázdných lahví.
translations.da: Der står flere tomme flasker på hylden.
translations.ja: 棚に空の瓶がいくつかあります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun in singular dative; object of the preposition 'im', specifying location.
Finite main verb (3rd person plural, present); intransitive verb indicating position; verb-second after the initial PP.
Indefinite quantifier determiner; modifies 'Flaschen' to indicate plural quantity.
Attributive adjective (plural, agreeing with 'Flaschen'); describes the state of the bottles.
Common noun in plural nominative; grammatical subject of 'stehen'.
